occurrence_sentence: Italy enters this arena as a leading player.

interaction_phrase: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) was an important milestone in forming a robust ecosystem that forges synergies among business, academia and local communities
occurrence_sentence: The National Recovery and Resilience Plan (NRRP) was an important milestone in forming a robust ecosystem that forges synergies among business, academia and local communities.

interaction_phrase: to forge solid international partnerships
occurrence_sentence: Above all, the Strategy equips the Italian Government to forge solid international partnerships and pursue optimal solutions to global economic, scientific, educational and security challenges.

interaction_phrase: capitalizing on the wealth of scientific expertise embedded in our Country
occurrence_sentence: By setting out this Strategy we also answer our stakeholders and international partners, guiding public and private investment and capitalizing on the wealth of scientific expertise embedded in our Country.

interaction_phrase: united top-tier scientific experts with officials from the Ministries and Agencies involved in quantum technology
occurrence_sentence: This has been a collective effort. The working group united top-tier scientific experts with officials from the Ministries and Agencies involved in quantum technology.

interaction_phrase: public and private investment and capitalizing on the wealth of scientific expertise embedded in our Country
occurrence_sentence: By setting out this Strategy we also answer our stakeholders and international partners, guiding public and private investment and capitalizing on the wealth of scientific expertise embedded in our Country.

interaction_phrase: the scientific community engaged
occurrence_sentence: Industry was extensively consulted, the scientific community engaged, and a public consultation captured further insights—embedding a forward-looking policy tool in every dimension of Italian life.

interaction_phrase: every dimension of Italian life
occurrence_sentence: Industry was extensively consulted, the scientific community engaged, and a public consultation captured further insights—embedding a forward-looking policy tool in every dimension of Italian life.

interaction_phrase: Collaboration—between government, enterprise, academia, research and labour market
occurrence_sentence: Collaboration—between government, enterprise, academia, research and labour market—remains the watchword for maximizing quantum technology's potential and drawing major investment to strengthen Italy's global competitiveness.

interaction_phrase: strengthen Italy's global competitiveness
occurrence_sentence: Collaboration—between government, enterprise, academia, research and labour market—remains the watchword for maximizing quantum technology's potential and drawing major investment to strengthen Italy's global competitiveness.

interaction_phrase: Collaboration—between the Government, businesses, academic institutions, the research community and the labour market
occurrence_sentence: Collaboration has been the key word - between the Government, businesses, academic institutions, the research community and the labour market - to fully harness the potential of quantum technologies.

interaction_phrase: strengthen Italy's position and competitiveness on the international stage
occurrence_sentence: It is precisely this spirit of collaboration that will underpin the implementation of the Strategy, with the clear understanding that a robust ecosystem will attract significant investments and strengthen Italy's position and competitiveness on the international stage.

interaction_phrase: European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC-JU)
occurrence_sentence: At the European level, since the launch of the European Quantum Technology Flagship in 2018, significant progress has been made in the field, with the promotion of initiatives such as the European Quantum Communications Infrastructure (EuroQCI) and the European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC-JU), leading up to the recent publication of the Communication "Competitiveness Compass for the EU" , which, in outlining the European Commission's agenda for strengthening competitiveness from a technology foresight perspective, identifies QTs as one of the areas of activity planned for the coming months.

interaction_phrase: European Commission's agenda for strengthening competitiveness
occurrence_sentence: At the European level, since the launch of the European Quantum Technology Flagship in 2018, significant progress has been made in the field, with the promotion of initiatives such as the European Quantum Communications Infrastructure (EuroQCI) and the European High Performance Computing Joint Undertaking (EuroHPC-JU), leading up to the recent publication of the Communication "Competitiveness Compass for the EU" , which, in outlining the European Commission's agenda for strengthening competitiveness from a technology foresight perspective, identifies QTs as one of the areas of activity planned for the coming months.

interaction_phrase: European strategy on QTs
occurrence_sentence: The aforementioned communication resulted in the publication of a European strategy on QTs at the beginning of July 2025 , and eventually in the proposal for a Quantum Act by the end of 2025.

interaction_phrase: EU and national programs
occurrence_sentence: EU and national programs will thus be aligned and investment in pan-European quantum computing, communication and sensing infrastructure supported.

interaction_phrase: European and international context
occurrence_sentence: The establishment of a national ecosystem (of both research and industry) in QTs also passes through cooperation and international relations, which must be conducted within the framework of the Country's fundamental foreign and security policy directions and alliances.

source_actor: Department for Digital Transformation of the Presidency of the Council of Ministers
interaction_phrase: Department for Digital Transformation (DTD) of the Presidency of the Council of Ministers, the National Cybersecurity Agency (ACN)
occurrence_sentence: The strategy was drafted by a Working Group composed of experts from the scientific community and representatives from the Ministry of University and Research (MUR), the Department for Digital Transformation (DTD) of the Presidency of the Council of Ministers, the National Cybersecurity Agency (ACN), the Ministry of Enterprises and Made in Italy (MIMIT), the Ministry of Defense, and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation (MAECI) in order to duly represent the interests of different public and private stakeholders.

interaction_phrase: active positioning in EU programs
occurrence_sentence: Internationalization and security: active positioning in EU programs and protection of critical technologies;

interaction_phrase: where companies and research institutions can work together
occurrence_sentence: the enhancement of national laboratories where companies and research institutions can work together will enable the development of new industrial solutions.

interaction_phrase: MIMIT has launched initiatives
occurrence_sentence: In recent years, MIMIT has launched initiatives across several quantum-technology domains, supporting feasibility studies, pilot lines and public–private partnerships, with the goal of nurturing start-ups and fostering convergence with established companies.

interaction_phrase: Italian deep-tech start-ups
occurrence_sentence: This document outlines an operational pathway to: attract and retain top talent; reinforce test, certification and prototyping infrastructure; develop a nation-wide network of competence centers; support the scale-up of Italian deep-tech start-ups; activate monitoring tools, KPIs and impact evaluation.

interaction_phrase: Italian Quantum Strategy
occurrence_sentence: Italy has the chance to be a protagonist of the second quantum revolution. Italian Quantum Strategy

interaction_phrase: European quantum industry
occurrence_sentence: Qu-Pilot, part of the Quantum Flagship, develops pilot lines to integrate quantum chip design and manufacturing, fostering the growth of the European quantum industry and sustainable industrial production.

interaction_phrase: European testbeds

interaction_phrase: European suppliers
occurrence_sentence: It is essential to ensure a secure supply of critical components such as chillers, laser systems, and optical components by continuously monitoring supply chains to avoid disruptions. In addition, the Government can foster market growth and maintain stable trade relations with EU and non-EU like-minded countries, such as through targeted regulations that prevent hostile foreign takeovers of companies developing critical technologies in the European Union.

occurrence_sentence: In addition, in March 2023, the European Committee for Standardization (CEN) and the European Committee for Electrotechnical Standardization (CENELEC) established a new joint committee, JTC22, on QTs.

interaction_phrase: within the European Economic Area
occurrence_sentence: Within the European Economic Area, strong social, cultural, scientific and economic ties enable faster consensus building than at the international level.
